biological_replicate: MLST was performed on 34 C. sakazakii strains
technical_replicate: a total of 2,319 proteins were identified for three biological repeats
experimental_design: strongly adhesive vs weakly adhesive comparison
SAKA80220 (strongly adhesive/invasive strain) compared with C. sakazakii SAKA80221 (weakly adhesive/invasive strain)
factor_value: strongly adhesive/invasive strain and weakly adhesive/invasive strain
number_of_samples: 34 strains described, and each strain is analyzed in 3 fractions
